case_title: NORMA BARRAZA VS. TAT MAN CHEUNG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PROOF OF MAILING OF EXHIBITS TO DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRAZA, NORMA
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRAZA, NORMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEUNG, TAT MAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF NORMA BARRAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TAT MAN CHEUNG IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS SHARON CHEUNG, WIFE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
